sections.paragraph:
χάριν [χάρις] acc. of χάρις functioning as prep. w. gen.

—a. accounting for an observation in view of, because of Lk 7:47; 1 J 3:12. In Eph 3:1, 14 Paul makes a connection, that’s why, with a preceding observation (in vs. 1 with delayed resolution expressed in vs. 8) and at the same time has in mind an objective that would fall under

—b. indicating an objective in the interest of, so as to secure/bring about Gal 3:19; 1 Ti 5:14; Tit 1:5, 11; Jd 16.
